checks.name: divisible_by(6,2) is True
checks.command: python3 -c "import sys; sys.path.insert(0, '.'); from utils import divisible_by; assert divisible_by(6, 2) is True"

checks.name: divisible_by(7,2) is False
checks.command: python3 -c "import sys; sys.path.insert(0, '.'); from utils import divisible_by; assert divisible_by(7, 2) is False"

checks.name: divisible_by(0,5) is True
checks.command: python3 -c "import sys; sys.path.insert(0, '.'); from utils import divisible_by; assert divisible_by(0, 5) is True"

checks.name: divisible_by(5,0) raises ValueError
checks.command: python3 -c "import sys; sys.path.insert(0, '.'); from utils import divisible_by; divisible_by(5, 0)"
